examples.text: اِعْلَمُوا أَنَّ اللَّهَ شَدِيدُ الْعِقَابِ وَأَنَّ اللَّهَ غَفُورٌ رَحِيمٌ
examples.english: Know that Allah is severe in punishment and that Allah is forgiving and merciful

etymology.text: فَعِيل (faʕīl)-type stative-verb derived from the active participle from the verb رَحِمَ (raḥima, “to be merciful”).
